fields.title: skill-manage: skill reload integration
fields.description: Plan: docs/plans/2026-03-27-agentic-skill-creation.md — Task 7. Export reloadSkills from skill-marker/index.ts. Wire as onSkillMutated callback in app.ts so $new-skill works immediately after creation.
fields.notes: Exported reloadSkills from skill-marker/index.ts. Verification: npx tsc --noEmit passed; npm run gate passed (lint 0 errors/0 warnings, vitest suites green).
